mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_wem_result ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_wem_result WHERE judgment = #{judgment} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_wem_result WHERE judgment = #{judgment}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wem_result (process_name, factor_name, sample_type, measured_value, twa_value, stel_value, exposure_standard, exceed_rate, judgment, has_report, measurement_date, measurement_agency, remarks, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{processName}, #{factorName}, #{sampleType}, #{measuredValue}, #{twaValue}, #{stelValue}, #{exposureStandard}, #{exceedRate}, #{judgment}, #{hasReport}, #{measurementDate}, #{measurementAgency}, #{remarks}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wem_result SET process_name = #{processName}, factor_name = #{factorName}, sample_type = #{sampleType}, measured_value = #{measuredValue}, twa_value = #{twaValue}, stel_value = #{stelValue}, exposure_standard = #{exposureStandard}, exceed_rate = #{exceedRate}, judgment = #{judgment}, has_report = #{hasReport}, measurement_date = #{measurementDate}, measurement_agency = #{measurementAgency}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
